hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or data.get('tool_response', {}).get('filePath', '')
if not fp or not fp.endswith('CommunityTab.tsx'):
    sys.exit(0)
try:
    with open(fp) as f:
        content = f.read()
    fixed = re.sub(r'(\})\s*\n\s*\}\s*$', r'\1\n', content)
    if fixed != content:
        with open(fp, 'w') as f:
            f.write(fixed)
except Exception:
    pass
"
